strategy: Plan around Guardian Spirit. On Round 2 he gives his whole side a revive-at-100% effect, so kill everything in the same round or your kills reverse.
He resists all schools only 20%, so any strong school works; set up and AoE the entire board at once to beat the revive.
Clear or hit through his shields. He reapplies Legion Shield on Round 2 and every third Round after, so Shatter or pop them before your big swing.
Handle the three Protection Pox he summons on Round 1 with your AoE rather than picking them off one at a time.
At 6,115 Health this is soloable with a strong AoE hitter, but the whole board must fall together.
cheatNotes: Round 1 he summons three Protection Pox minions and casts a Blinding Light that leaves no stun shield.
Round 2 he gives his entire side Guardian Spirit, reviving them at 100% Health after defeat, so kill everything at once or remove it before finishing them.
Round 2 and every third Round after, he casts Legion Shield on his side, so clear it or hit through before your big swing.
